TRAIT_A_CARB_FRAGILITY.instruction: Trait A: High TCF7L2 Risk. Fragile glucose handling. Pre-workout carbs will likely cause an insulin-driven performance crash.

TRAIT_B_FAT_POWER.instruction: Trait B: Elite PPARA Fat Oxidation. Your body is hard-wired to prioritize lipids during exercise. Training fasted maximizes this efficiency.

TRAIT_C_INSULIN_EFFICIENCY.instruction: Trait C: High IRS1 Sensitivity. Robust nutrient partitioning. You can successfully utilize 30g+ of carbs pre-lift for explosive drive.

TRAIT_D_ADRENALINE_RESISTANCE.instruction: Trait D: ADRB2 Resistance. Your adrenaline receptors are 'blunted'. You require a longer, higher-intensity warmup to mobilize energy stores.

TRAIT_E_METABOLIC_CLASH.instruction: Trait E: ADRA2A Risk. Adrenaline aggressively shuts down your insulin. Avoid 'hype-up' stimulants if eating a fed pre-workout meal.

TRAIT_F_SENSORY_SWEET_LAG.instruction: Trait F: SLC2A2 Deficit. Impaired sugar-sensing in the brain. Sugary pre-workouts won't satisfy energy drive, leading to over-ingestion.

TRAIT_G_GLUT4_LATENCY.instruction: Trait G: Low SLC2A4 Response. Your muscles pull in glucose slowly. Pre-workout meals require a 60-minute lead time to reach muscle cells.

lipid_oxidation_efficient.instruction: Perform 15m Zone 2 Cardio. Your hardware has a high capacity for fat mobilization and mitochondrial heat production.

lipid_oxidation_resistant.instruction: Use HIIT-style warmup (30s sprints). You require a catecholamine spike (intensity) to force fat-mobilization from resistant receptors.

fast_dilation.instruction: Rapid vasodilation. 5-8m warmup is sufficient for peak oxygen delivery to the working muscle floor.

slow_dilation.instruction: Delayed vasodilation. 15m+ progressive warmup required to overcome high baseline vascular tension and NO deficiency.

explosive_power_hardware.instruction: Prioritize Heavy (85-95% 1RM) and Low Volume. High-torque engine thrives on maximal mechanical tension. Reps >8 are junk volume for your profile.

hypertrophy_volume_hardware.instruction: Prioritize Metabolic Stress (10-15 reps). You lack the fast-twitch anchor protein for max power; grow via volume and short rest intervals.

atp_recycling_lag.instruction: Mandatory 3-5m rest between sets. Your system recycles ATP slowly. Short rest will result in exponential power drop-off.

omega_3_dependency.instruction: Ingest 3g Marine-Source EPA/DHA immediately post-lift. You cannot convert plant fats; you must use pre-formed oils to stop the inflammatory cascade.

collagen_bottleneck.instruction: Mandatory 500mg Vitamin C + Gelatin post-workout. Stiff tendons + low Vit-C transport = high risk of micro-tears not healing.

high_reactivity_cool_down.instruction: Evening Cold Shower / Ice Bath. High inflammatory reactivity causes core temperature to stay high, blocking sleep onset post-training.

circadian_lag.instruction: 0.3mg Melatonin + 100% Blue Light Block at 9 PM. Your synthesis enzyme is slow; hardware-level intervention is required for morning recovery.

high_friction_profile.instruction: 3 Sessions Per Week Max. High-Power Engine + Stiff Chassis + Slow Clearance = Structural Failure if frequency exceeds 3x/week.

fast_clearance_profile.instruction: High Frequency Capable (5-6 days). Efficient cellular cleaning and low inflammatory baseline allows for rapid stimulus re-application.
